form.formComment: Two-year-old colt who is first starter by Master Of My Fate out of Aunt Polly. Has the right credentials to run a forward race.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At very long odds at debut, 4th of 10 at this track on February 25 over 1000m, 8 len behind Rich Man's World carrying 60kg at $101. Last start 7th of 10 at this track on March 30 over 1200m, 12 len behind Kalahari King with 60kg at $21. Impossible to tip with any confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 300m, brushed by Aquae Calidae.
Slow into stride, and raced green.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Durbanville on March 21 over 1400m, nose behind From The Island with 60kg at $5.50. Before that 7th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1000m, 6 len behind World Series carrying 60kg at $8. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at this track January 13 over 1000m, 8 len behind St Harry carrying 60kg at $67. On debut ran last of 10 at this track November 22 over 800m, 12 len behind Querari Dancer carrying 60kg at $13.50. Prepared to watch.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by a nose at Durbanville March 21 over 1400m defeating Hero's Journey carrying 60kg at $4. The run before that 5th of 13 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Lady Jean carrying 60kg at $4. Big chance again now that the penny has dropped.
